x-enumeration-literals.name: Tax Calculation Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Tax Calculation Term: Rules that define how taxes are calculated on financial transactions or products, including applicable rates, formulas, and taxable bases.

Comment:
Example:
Interest on a savings account is subject to 30% withholding tax, calculated on the total interest earned monthly.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Tax Withholding Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Tax Withholding / Deduction Term: Provisions specifying how and when taxes are withheld or deducted from payments to the customer.

Comment:
Example:
The bank deducts tax at the time of crediting interest to the customer account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Tax Reporting Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Tax Reporting Term: Rules outlining the reporting obligations to the tax authority and to the customer, including timing, format, and details of taxable transactions.

Comment:
Example:
Banks must submit annual reports of all interest income earned by customers to the revenue authority.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Tax Payment Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Tax Remittance /Provisions specifying how and when collected taxes must be paid or remitted to the tax authority.

Comment:
Example:
Withholding taxes must be remitted to the government monthly, in accordance with regulatory deadlines. Payment Term:

x-enumeration-literals.name: Tax Exemption Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Tax Exemption / Relief Term: Rules specifying conditions under which tax exemptions, reduced rates, or treaty benefits apply.

Comment:
Example:
Foreign investors may receive reduced withholding tax under a bilateral tax treaty.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Tax Penalty Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Compliance / Penalty Term: Conditions that define penalties or consequences for non-compliance with tax rules, such as late payment fees or regulatory fines.

Comment:
Example:
Late remittance of withholding tax by the bank incurs interest penalties as per law.
